title.text: ECHO  by Dembrane - Voice capture & automatic transcription

description.text: Record offline conversations, uncover insights and bring them on your platform.

body:0002.text: ECHO is a voice recording and auto-transcription tool that helps capture insights from public meetings, interviews, or citizen assemblies. It turns spoken conversations into written transcripts and summary reports.

body:0006.text: Sensemaking applied to the transcript to identify key insights and the ability to do sensemaking across different transcripts.

body:0012.text: How to integrate ECHO with your Go Vocal platform?

body:0013.text: Currently the best way to use ECHO in correlation with your Go Vocal platform is to use the Go Vocal platform as the user facing projects and communication point, and use ECHO as the place to collect insights and analysis insights.

body:0014.text: For example for a Citizen Assembly: Use Go Vocal platform to set up an event page, add a screenshot of the ECHO QR code to your event description. You can always have a pre-event phase to collect ideas for the assembly day. Then use a post-event phase in Go Vocal to share insights and reports from ECHO.

body:0015.text: In this future we hope to have a full integration where you will be able to bring insights from ECHO into your ideation project for example, so we can support offline ideation projects better!

body:0016.text: How to access and setup your ECHO account?

body:0017.text: Contact support via the chat bubble on your Go Vocal platform.

body:0021.text: Email (use a shared one if multiple users need access)

body:0022.text: You’ll receive an email from Dembrane with login credentials.

body:0023.text: Visit https://docs.dembrane.com to learn how to use the interface or head to Documentation in your new account

body:0026.text: Premium clients (free trial: 1 project/year, 20 hours of recording)

body:0028.text: ECHO supports multiple interface and transcription languages.

body:0029.text: Interface languages: English, German, French, Spanish, Dutch

body:0030.text: Speech recognition: Supports all major languages found online

body:0031.text: Translation options: Transcripts can be translated into EN, DE, FR, ES, or NL

body:0032.text: Other target languages available on request

body:0034.text: How to report issues regarding ECHO?

body:0035.text: Get support for ECHO either from within Dembrane or via your Go Vocal support team.

body:0037.text: Use the Report an issue button under the settings icon in your Dembrane account.

body:0039.text: Use the chat bubble on your Go Vocal platform or email support@govocal.com
